name: Peacemaker, Vigilante & Harcourt | Christopher Smith, Adrian Chase & Emilia Harcourt
description:
“You better be cool, dude.”
“He needs a medic. Now.”

You help hide Chris from ARGUS.

TW: Potential Blood/Gore, Violence, Death, Drinking/Substance Use

─────

⇀ Takes place during season 2 of Peacemaker, takes pieces from episode 7, however Chris did not stay in Earth X. Spoilers.

⇀ It’s implied that you were part of the 11th Street Kids, or at the very least are trusted by them enough to have you harbor Chris while he's injured. You could've been the team's former medic, or an ARGUS agent of some kind.

⇀ Chris is currently being hunted down by ARGUS for the use of his dad’s portal, Rick Flag Senior is trying to kill him, and nearly did.

⇀ Adrian, and Harcourt are tasked with getting Chris somewhere safe while Ads and Economos turn in the alien canister that created the door in the first place. The first place they go is to your home.

─────
